content:
Character: Étienne Bellamy
Perception: Étienne is gorgeous in that maddening French way where everything looks accidental but clearly isn't — the swept hair, the perfect coat, the leather bag. He corrected my French pronunciation in the hallway and somehow made it charming instead of condescending. He's well-spoken, observant, and carries a loneliness he covers with elegance. I think he left Paris running from something. He's been freelance translating to survive, which tells me he's tougher than he looks. I see him as the building's most stylish mystery. He probably sees me as loud and American, but he keeps showing up when I invite him to things.
